untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition (Double Bottoms with Eve & Adam morphology) requires shape/width/curvature analysis of price structure that cannot be expressed with available technical indicators. Specific requirements like 'left bottom wide and rounded' vs 'right bottom narrow and V-shaped' require candlestick pattern detection or custom shape indicators not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Partial translation attempted: Used falling volume trend (volume < sma_20) and upward breakout (close crosses above pivot) as proxy conditions. However, the core pattern definition requires visual/structural analysis beyond technical indicators. The 35-day hold period comes from bear market momentum weakness timing. Stop loss of 3.1% approximates average decline percentage from parameters. A full implementation would require a dedicated pattern recognition module.
